- topaz: a gemstone
- cumin: a spice
- face: body part
- armoire: furniture
- axe: tool
- desk: furniture
- son: family relation
- sage: this could be a spice/herb

The best answer is "mace" because mace and nutmeg come from the same plant - nutmeg is the seed and mace is the aril (the reddish covering) around the nutmeg seed. They are extremely closely related.

"cumin" and "sage" are also spices/herbs, but they're not as closely related to nutmeg as mace is.

I can only choose 1 word, so I'll go with "mace".
